summary: W942 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while consolidating W941 selected-difference and mapped-cokernel primitive closedness leaves into the existing W725 closedness branch. The route projects the W725 closed-map branch directly and the closed-embedding branch through IsClosedEmbedding.isClosedMap, then delegates through the W941/W940/W937/W936/W935/W934/W933/W932/W931/W930 route stack. Product success remains false because the W942 leaves are still explicit assumptions, and the original four-task completion witness and review packet remain incomplete.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W942 refines W941 by replacing three selected-difference primitive closed-map leaves and one mapped-cokernel primitive closed-map leaf with W725 closedness branch data, while that provider and the rest of the W942 leaves are still not instantiated.

W942 is still a closed-map branch route. The W898 closed-embedding endpoint-homology-free branch remains separately available; no no-argument branch choice or final original-four-task witness has been constructed.

The remaining W942 fields include W716 boundary data, W717 relation data, primitive target-difference and target-codomain compactness quantifiers, W725 closedness branch data, one normalized strict-representative lift blueprint, fixed-target uniqueness obligations, one W722 source-triangulation data provider, one endpoint strictShortExact witness field, bounded-homotopy localized right-adjoint fields, and the component-level unit mapping-cone witness.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The completion review packet still lacks the immutable-contract product-success evidence, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.
remaining_work: Construct or precisely block concrete values for the thirteen W942 closed-map target-compact closedness-data boundary-relation-data normalized-strict-representative-lift source-triangulation endpoint-strict-exact unit-strict-exact-components explicit inputs.

Choose the next smallest contract-closing increment from actual boundary-data construction, relation-data construction, target-surjectivity proof, target-compactness proof construction, W725 closedness data construction, normalized-lift blueprint construction, fixed-target uniqueness, W722 source-category triangulation evidence, endpoint strict-exact construction, localized-right-adjoint data, unit mapping-cone component construction, or another supported concrete provider boundary.
Connect a real no-argument route to the original four-task completion witness only after all route inputs are real rather than merely exposed as fields.
Refresh the completion review packet, negative fixtures, manifest, clean extraction audit, and terminal outcome only after the original witness exists.
